evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 7.6 to 8.0. Here's my CustomText regex code: before-8.0-regex.js and config_7.6.xml.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps plugin specs to ^8.0.0 in config.xml and renames CustomText regex properties: pattern→valueRegex, dataTypePattern→anchorRegex, plus the plural variants.

assertions.text: config.xml plugin specs are updated to ^8.0.0 for scandit-cordova-datacapture-core/barcode/label
Setup-check mentions cordova prepare for ios and android

evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 8.1 to 8.2 so I can react to manual field corrections. Here's my main script: before-8.2-validation-flow.js and config_8.1.xml.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps versions to ^8.2.0 and adds didSubmitManualInputForField to the existing validation flow listener. didCaptureLabelWithFields is preserved.

assertions.text: didSubmitManualInputForField is added to the validation flow listener

evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 8.2 to 8.4. Here's my main script: before-8.4-validation-flow.js and config_8.2.xml. I want fine-grained progress feedback as the validation flow accumulates partial results.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps versions to ^8.4.0, adds didUpdateValidationFlowResult to the existing listener. didCaptureLabelWithFields and didSubmitManualInputForField are preserved.

assertions.text: didUpdateValidationFlowResult is added to the validation flow listener
didUpdateValidationFlowResult signature includes (type, asyncId, fields, getFrameData) parameters
No web-only renames (e.g. setValueRegex/setAnchorRegex) are introduced
